title: Cool Citrusy Indian Fish Thali
description: A refreshing and light Indian-inspired fish dish featuring citrus and floral flavors, perfect for a post-workout meal, with noodles and fish cooked in a papillote, served as a thali
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together lemon juice, olive oil, grated ginger, and minced garlic.
Place a fish fillet in the center of a piece of aluminum foil, brush the lemon mixture on top, and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Fold the foil over the fish to create a papillote and repeat with the remaining fish fillets.
Bake the fish in the preheated oven for 12 minutes or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, prepare the noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together orange zest and chopped coriander leaves.
To assemble the thali, place a cooked fish fillet on a plate, add a scoop of noodles, and sprinkle with the orange and coriander mixture.
